prompt: Full-body outdoor portrait of a young Indian woman in her late teens to early 20s with a fair light skin tone, standing on a narrow stone-paved walkway beside a long rusty red metal fence that recedes into the distance. She has extremely long, thick, naturally voluminous wavy dark black hair flowing well below her waist. Her face is softly anonymized/blurred, but the pose should feel cheerful and playful: both arms raised, making peace signs with both hands near her face, elbows bent outward. She wears a dark forest green midi dress with short sleeves, a V-neck placket, a tie belt at the waist, and gold embroidered floral block-print motifs repeated across the bodice, sleeves, and skirt; include a gold embroidered border around the neckline and sleeve hems. Add exactly 2 visible shoes: clean white lace-up sneakers. Add exactly 1 visible accessory: a simple black bracelet on one wrist. The setting is lush and natural, with green grass and plants along the path, trees in the blurred background, and shallow depth of field. Use soft overcast daylight, realistic photography, vertical 2:3 composition, subject centered, full body visible from head to shoes, natural colors, detailed fabric texture, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
